personas.name: Maya
personas.quote: I need my tools to keep up with my vision.
personas.typicalAnswer_q1: I want to finally launch my personal brand. I've been designing for other people for years.
personas.typicalAnswer_q5: Success is someone telling me my work changed how they see something.

personas.name: Kai
personas.quote: I want to build things that actually matter.
painPoints: Memory constraints when running local models
personas.typicalAnswer_q1: I'm building an AI tool for developers. We're in early beta and I want to hit our v1 launch.
personas.typicalAnswer_q5: When the product is used by thousands of people who rely on it.

personas.name: Jordan
personas.quote: I need everything to work, every time.
personas.typicalAnswer_q1: I want to double our team's output without doubling headcount.
personas.typicalAnswer_q5: My team getting promoted. That's when I know I've done my job.

personas.name: Alex
personas.quote: My office is wherever I open my laptop.
personas.typicalAnswer_q1: I want to work from 5 different countries this year without compromising my client work.
personas.typicalAnswer_q5: Opening my laptop in a new city and everything just works.
